title: Recipes Galore
description: The purpose of this datapack is to restore or add recpes to the game and making Minecraft have a bit more of quality of life. So far there are over 29+ recipes (unless you consider the woodcutter and others that I have merged than it's way over 100+)
body:
July 2, 2024: For now I have archived this project because I haven't been playing Minecraft at all for the past few months plus I still need to fix it for 1.20.5 and above.

July 31, 2023: I have re-branded to Recipes Galore

The purpose of this datapack is to restore or add recpes to the game and making Minecraft have a bit more of quality of life. So far there are over 29+ recipes (unless you consider the woodcutter and others that I have merged than it's way over 100+)

<details>
<summary>Click me to see all the recipes!</summary>

<details>
<summary>God Powers</summary>

Enchanted Golden Apple

![god](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AshFgSpV/images/cfa40b7eafd8559c2ebae7b802b3b2def6b1cb25.png)

Totem of Undying

![Totem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AshFgSpV/images/05c0c0aea9fb82a2e36d493ea006c33db80d142f.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Uncategorized Recipes</summary>

Nametag

![nametag](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AshFgSpV/images/d8ecd91f0c00ccefcc85a8d7840a37b7e18a3265.png)

Bell

![Bell](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AshFgSpV/images/264408d4f52776e7916153d9d9c3b0701347d507.png)

Bundles (rabbit hide is the same setup)

![Bundle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AshFgSpV/images/61de5d4aef251d8f6499c4ef43c6843e00db43d9.png)

Soul sand to soil (and vice versa)

![Sand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AshFgSpV/images/a321387e79f4b5a5c4092d71fa3b2ae40522256f.png)

Cobwebs

![Cobweb](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AshFgSpV/images/7b6f71c261e4cdb19659e72a85c017f3e140e230.png)

Coal/Charcoal to black dye

![Black Dye](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AshFgSpV/images/b15d8405255cbd38c26a44d2ff67c78f88e0d9b2.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Armour and Horse Stuff</summary>

Chainmail Armour (you know the rest)

![Chainmail Helmet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AshFgSpV/images/0dc47b02a07c844653a9ba227696f926aa0d6ddb.png)

Saddle #1

![Saddle 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AshFgSpV/images/d9caced2bbf741ad02cc61c7f85db83fd6b89a23.png)

Saddle #2

![Saddle 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AshFgSpV/images/b546206f0cea4c1fd758912b3efe1461b450f9e8.png)

Horse Armour (gold and iron have the same setup)

![Horse](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AshFgSpV/images/59cc840517b4c9a2ae9a195416d374f2f95eef0d.png)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Unpackables</summary>


Wool to String (works with every wool variant)

![Wool](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AshFgSpV/images/9d0135d444e6c3ac1d456f4cd42fa97f3f6e9f91.png)

Wart block to wart

![Wart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AshFgSpV/images/f30f2c01bedca8d0c8a32cd9d140406e340fd039.png)

Amethyst block to shards

![Shards](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AshFgSpV/images/28f38548c811bafa4702b994b5abe042bc6d3901.png)

Quartz block to quartz

![Quartz](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AshFgSpV/images/c3254d9787e9d928158f18c4f522c2cb03582a5a.png)

Dripstone block to pointed dripstone

![drip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AshFgSpV/images/7836987d0ffe92518c190e32d3dd846398b8dd22.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Bulk Crafting</summary>

Bulk bowls

![Bowls](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AshFgSpV/images/5c5086105defa44e1aef43a7b8311fea48d36b61.png)

Bulk chests

![Chests](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AshFgSpV/images/474c9ebfc70ba247f976bed7dacfde97df9db4da.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Cheaper Items</summary>

Templates

![Templates](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AshFgSpV/images/a22a211f5c105ba7039e519bb726769b3f72c8bb.png)

Tinted Glass

![Tint](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AshFgSpV/images/729c083bac08951bf913a2439e253f2577d39384.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Smelting</summary>

Raw blocks to block of X (smelting time takes the exact same as if you were smelting 1 raw ore and also gives exact experience if you were to smelt 9 raw ore)

![Raw](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AshFgSpV/images/60fbd65d7b531d65ab64a63dc0e6f85a302e35e8.png)

Rotten flesh to leather

![Flesh](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AshFgSpV/images/28ef6b69363e9c1832299f4aa9e76a5e7e57be13.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Shapeless Crafting</summary>

Shulker #1

![Shulker 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AshFgSpV/images/6cb067fcdbb8ed71c11ba38e66bd2acf3990e5cf.png)

Shulker #2

![Shulker 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AshFgSpV/images/5c401ba950263ee16c9ea3a54d95e2b042a9b21c.png)

Bread

![Bread](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AshFgSpV/images/2efeed4017fdb87503d32846065abb9e6280a81f.png)

Paper

![Paper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AshFgSpV/images/cc1e90d59b00a699edc0057786764466fe9854f0.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Woodcutter</summary>

Woodcutter #1

![Cutter 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AshFgSpV/images/5cada9c6d318cc4992004ba9cbb8046c0e8fbb33.png)

Woodcutter #2

![Cutter 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AshFgSpV/images/e34f5e3f1d0fda133ce8302c1ed6037ff5489700.png)

</details>

</details>

**Note: I mainly focus on 1.20.x for now. I might revisit previous Minecraft versions in the future**

Future:
1) More bulk craftables
2) More faster crafting
3) Glowberries → Glowstone dust
4) Craftable budding amethyst
5) Craftable reinforced deepslate
6) Craftable shroomlight
7) Craftable elytra
8) Craftable eggs (dragon, sniffer, turtle)
